ivc_d: An immune-supporting antioxidant at doses far higher than the gut can absorb — from low-dose support for fatigue and inflammation to high-dose support during chemotherapy and radiation.
glut_d: The body's “master antioxidant,” central to detoxifying the chemicals we're constantly exposed to and counteracting cellular stress.
bvit_d: Delivered straight to your cells to support energy, metabolism, DNA repair, brain and nerve function, and detoxification.
pc_d: Repairs the cell membranes damaged by toxins so cells communicate efficiently again — supporting the liver, brain, and cognition.
nad_d: A cellular “battery” linked to energy, DNA repair, and tissue regeneration — often helpful for chronic fatigue and neurodegenerative concerns.
chel_d: A safe, effective way to test for and remove the heavy metals that accumulate in the body over a lifetime.
ket_d: Studied for treatment-resistant depression and chronic pain, delivered in a safe setting with psychotherapy integration (a minimum of three sessions).
sv_intro: Whether you're facing a complex chronic condition or simply want a doctor with the time to know you, there's a path that fits.
fm_h: Testing that gets to the root.
fm_p: In-depth testing for hormones, gut health, and nutritional status, used to address the root causes of chronic conditions. There's no membership fee for functional medicine — it's pay-as-you-go, with visits generally spaced six to eight weeks apart and email access to Dr. Kanani included between appointments.
iv_p: IV nutritional therapies bypass the gut barrier and deliver nutrients directly to your cells for maximum benefit — supportive for everything from a common cold to chronic Lyme, mold detox, and cancer care.
dpc_h: A direct relationship with your doctor.
dpc_p: A membership model where you and your doctor have a direct relationship — no insurance company in the middle. That means more time together, a deeper relationship, and more personalized attention. Members keep their own health insurance for emergencies, labs, imaging, and referrals; the office simply doesn't bill it.
fee_note: Medicare is accepted and billed; Medicare patients pay the additional monthly membership fee for services Medicare doesn't cover. Private insurance credentialing is in process and will be accepted shortly.
